chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 567 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.4739/2023 (Stay/App.) 18.09.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present and his Counsel is called absent. SIP Talib Hussain Jiskani, SHO, Police Station Baharo, District Khairpur (respondent No.2) has appeared and filed a statement stating therein that in compliance of order dated 15.08.2023 (impugned order), passed by IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur, an FIR bearing No.88 of 2023 under Section 382 PPC at Police Station Baharo has been registered against the applicant. Therefore, this application, filed against said order, has become infructuous. In view of above, instant Criminal Misc. Application, having become infructuous, is dismissed along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
